entries.title: confirm before destructive actions
entries.preview: Andy requires confirmation before any destructive actions (file deletions, rm -rf, system changes, credential modifications). Never auto-execute destructive commands.

entries.title: heartbeat visibility
entries.preview: Andy wants HEARTBEAT_OK acknowledgments. He likes seeing that background processes and cron jobs are running as expected.

entries.title: log decisions with clawvault
entries.preview: Important decisions should be logged with ClawVault for future reference. Helps maintain continuity across sessions and model switches.

entries.title: practical solutions over theory
entries.preview: Andy prefers practical, actionable solutions over theoretical explanations. Direct, hands-on approaches. No over-explaining simple tasks.

entries.title: show costs for api heavy work
entries.preview: When work involves significant API usage or costs, show estimated costs upfront. Andy wants visibility into resource usage.

entries.title: use cheapest model that works
entries.preview: Default to the most cost-effective model that can handle the task. Only escalate to more expensive models (Opus, o1) when complexity demands it.
